case_title: LEONARD CHETELAT VS. PATRICK KIMBLEY et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHETELAT, LEONARD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHETELAT, LEONARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHETELAT, LEONARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15A NOE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,380.00 RENT, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,655.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHETELAT, LEONARD AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION - UNLAWFUL DETAINER
